message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Update Relationship Event Handler UML

participant "SNS" as SNS
    participant "Event Dispatcher Topic" as EDTopic
participant "Lambda" as Lambda
    participant "Update Relationship Event Handler" as Handler
participant "DynamoDB" as DynamoDB
    participant "Relationship Owner Table" as OwnerTable
    participant "Relationship Commitment Table" as CommitmentTable

EDTopic -> Handler: filter on Relationship::Update Event

activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: [SessionDecorator.puml]
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: [TrackEventHandlerWrapper.puml]
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: extract Message from Event
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: validate Message
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: validate event-name
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: validate event-version
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: validate stage
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> OwnerTable: Get Existing Relationship
activate OwnerTable
OwnerTable --> Handler
deactivate OwnerTable
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Generate Relationship Dict
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Combine Existing Relationship Attributes With New Changes
deactivate Handler

opt if missing required schema key
    activate Handler
    Handler -> Handler: Error Handling
    deactivate Handler
end

activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Get AdditionalAttributes
deactivate Handler

alt if Relationship contains description and AdditionalAttributes doesn't contain completed signal
    activate Handler
    Handler -> OwnerTable: update Relationship
    activate OwnerTable
    OwnerTable --> Handler
    deactivate OwnerTable
    deactivate Handler
    activate Handler
    Handler -> Handler: Error Handling
    deactivate Handler
end

activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Generate commitments to add or delete
deactivate Handler

alt if Commitment Operations Exist
    activate Handler
    Handler -> Handler: Generate starting indexes based on AdditionalAttributes
    deactivate Handler
    activate Handler
    Handler -> CommitmentTable: Batch_Write() RelationshipCommitments
    activate CommitmentTable
    CommitmentTable --> Handler
    deactivate CommitmentTable
    deactivate Handler
    activate Handler
    Handler -> Handler: Error Handling
    deactivate Handler
end

activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Track Event Handler Wrapper
deactivate Handler
activate Handler
Handler -> Handler: Error Handler Wrapper
deactivate Handler

@enduml
```
